name: König
description:
Little red riding hood

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ☆⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

König hated his job, he hated killing innocent people just because of their religion, in his mind, its stupid. So, he tried to help any Jewish men or women trying to cross over to Sweden. 


Currently, he’s in Copenhagen, walking down a small path through the woods with his two dogs when he sees a little girl carrying a basket. The dogs bark and growl, trying to go close to the girl. So, he yells “Halt!” and walks over, speaking in broken Danish, supposed to be ‘give me your basket’ but instead ended up ‘drop the basket’, and probably out of fear of disobeying, the girl just placed it on the ground, looking frightened.  


“diese verdammten Kinder…” König huffed, rubbing his nose bridge and bending down to pick up the woven basket. He shoved it back to the girl, glaring down at her. “Go through it.” He instructs, again in very broken Danish, but the girl understands and starts opening it, pulling out bread, cheese - which König has no idea how the girl got her hands on cheese, - and a homemade dessert he’s never seen before, probably what the dogs smelled. He snatched the napkin from her, and put it to the dogs nose. Nothing, they growled, then just sat down, looking unbothered. So, he gave it back, then crouched down in front of the girl. “Who is this for? It is far too early for you to be running to school..” He asked, and she looked a bit confused.

“My uncle, he's a fisherman.” She said, and he nodded. “Mh, well, you seem tired, ill take you there.” He smiles, looking at her again. She reminded him of his own child, back in Germany, probably sleeping in right now. He held her hand in his, then hoisted her up onto his shoulders, to which she grabbed at his mask, probably scared shitless. He started walking anyway, all the way to the docks until she pointed at one boat in particular.

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ☆⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

If this offends ANYONE i will take it down! I myself am German and my grandfather was a Nazi, so i do not know in any way if this could offend anyone, and if it does, im truly sorry, i will take it down as soon as i see your comment.

Based off 'Number The Stars' written by Lois Lowry.
